name: Natasha Ivanova
title: Quantitative Trader
summary: Quant trader on the FX derivatives desk at a global investment bank. Manages a structured FX options book, runs daily P&L attribution, and develops automated execution strategies. 6 years across Goldman Sachs and JP Morgan.

highlights: Manages structured FX options book with $200M notional, with daily delta/vega hedging
Developed automated execution strategy for vanilla FX options reducing market impact by 18%
Owns real-time volatility surface model calibration integrated into trading desk risk system
Traded USD and EUR interest rate swaps on the flow rates desk
Built Excel VBA tooling for intraday P&L attribution used by 8 traders
Rotated through FX and credit desks as part of structured trader development program
Completed analyst rotations across fixed income, FX, and equities
Top analyst cohort ranking — offered early promotion to associate
